entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: An important food legume and high-value cash crop in Ethiopia used for livelihood and commercialization

entities.name: ETHIOPIA
entities.description: The country where the study on chickpea production and export is focused

entities.name: CENTRAL HIGHLANDS OF ETHIOPIA
entities.description: The specific region in Ethiopia where smallholder chickpea production was assessed

entities.name: DOMESTIC RESOURCE COST COEFFICIENT ANALYSIS
entities.description: An analytical method used to assess the competitiveness of chickpea production

entities.name: FARM HOUSEHOLD SURVEYS
entities.description: A data collection method used to gather information for the DRC analysis

entities.name: PRICE AND TRADE DATA
entities.description: Information on prices and trade used to evaluate market trends and competitiveness

entities.name: COMPETITIVENESS
entities.description: The ability of Ethiopian chickpea production to compete in domestic and export markets

entities.name: COMMERCIALIZATION
entities.description: The process of transitioning chickpea production toward high-value market sales

entities.name: EXPORT MARKET SHARE
entities.description: The percentage of the global chickpea export market held by Ethiopia

entities.name: QUALITY
entities.description: A characteristic of chickpea that influences its competitiveness in high-value markets

entities.name: VOLUME
entities.description: The quantity of chickpea produced and exported

entities.name: SUPPLY CONTINUITY
entities.description: The consistency of chickpea supply to export markets
